title: Daily Decision Improvement Candidate Schema
description: Schema skeleton for recording possible improvements that require Decision Lab validation before production use.

schema.candidate_statement: 當一線科技巨頭開出歷史級 Expectation Gap 利多，且 Pattern Saturation <= 50，系統可建立 BUY / WATCH 升級候選，但必須經過 Decision Lab 多案例驗證。

validation_notes: This file must not use production-rule language.
Improvement candidates require multi-case Decision Lab validation.
No candidate directly changes Theme Score, Stage Score, or Decision Score.
